scripts.format:all: yarn format && yarn workspaces foreach -A -p -v run format
scripts.format:check:all: yarn format:check && yarn workspaces foreach -A -p -v run format:check
scripts.lint: oxlint -f default --ignore-pattern 'apps/**' --ignore-pattern 'packages/**' --ignore-pattern 'services/**' && yarn lint:md && yarn lint:yaml
scripts.lint:all: yarn lint && yarn workspaces foreach -A -p -v run lint
scripts.lint:ci: oxlint -f github --ignore-pattern 'apps/**' --ignore-pattern 'packages/**' --ignore-pattern 'services/**' && yarn lint:md && yarn lint:yaml
scripts.lint:ci:all: yarn lint:ci && yarn workspaces foreach -A -p -v run lint:ci
scripts.lint:fix:all: yarn lint:fix && yarn workspaces foreach -A -p -v run lint:fix
scripts.test:coverage:all: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude shotlab -p -v run test:coverage
